supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric users may encounter replication issues with mirrored databases if any columns contain invalid characters. Engineers are actively working on mitigating the issue and an update will be provided soon
active.detailsText: a { text-decoration: none; color: #464feb;}tr th, tr td { border: 1px solid #e6e6e6;}tr th { background-color: #f5f5f5;} Fabric users may encounter replication issues with mirrored databases if any columns contain invalid characters. Engineers are actively working on mitigating the issue and an update will be provided soon
